coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version reports 8.11.58 and releaseTag v8.11.58
Vercel production /api/health?service=ai returns JSON 200 cloud-run backend
Cloud Run /health returns ai-engine version 8.11.58 with redis/routesReady true
GitLab deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke jobs success
Cloud Run ai-engine revision ai-engine-00371-krm deployed and serving 100 percent traffic
Vercel production dashboard shows Vercel static OTel and 24h rotating dataset labels
Mobile /dashboard/ai-assistant hands off to /dashboard AI sidebar and hides 전체 화면으로 열기
skippedSurfaces: guest AI assistant long-query SSE run
landing page functional regression sweep - landing code was intentionally not modified

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab v8.11.58 tag pipeline completed frontend deploy, Cloud Run AI Engine deploy, and both post-deploy smoke jobs successfully. Production /api/version and Cloud Run /health now serve 8.11.58.

Cloud Tasks payload oversize handling is bounded by deterministic tests and dispatch now returns 413 PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE instead of falling through as an internal error. AI Engine post-deploy smoke passed after deployment.

Focused regression tests, root quick/type/lint/contract gates, AI Engine type/test suite, GitLab deploy smokes, and targeted Playwright production checks passed for the changed API, Cloud Tasks, dashboard label, and mobile handoff surfaces.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.11.58 release smoke; effective $18.4121, billed $0.0000, no unexpected billed usage.

completedImprovements.title: Cloud Tasks dispatch payload byte guard and 413 response
completedImprovements.note: Payloads over 64 KiB are rejected before enqueue and exposed as PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE.

completedImprovements.title: /api/health respects development cache disabled runtime config
completedImprovements.note: Development full health responses now use no-store and do not populate module cache.

completedImprovements.title: Dashboard OTel labels and mobile AI sidebar handoff deployed to production
completedImprovements.note: Previously recorded propagation drift QA-20260429-0363 is no longer reproduced for the checked labels and mobile handoff.

notes: Release script production verification passed on attempt 23/81 after Vercel deployment propagation.
GitLab post_deploy_smoke passed on attempt 1/9 with expected version 8.11.58 and commit 2a76df0c5a7714421ebc1687041d220ae17adc08.
Direct Cloud Run /health returned ai-engine version 8.11.58 and redis/routesReady true.
Current main has an additional post-release commit c81a56e31 after v8.11.58; this QA run is intentionally tied to the v8.11.58 tag commit.
